Package at.jku.se.dto.request

package at.jku.se.dto.request
  • Klassen
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    DeviceCreateRequest
    Request body for adding a new virtual device to a room (FR-04).
    DeviceRenameRequest
    Request body for renaming an existing device (FR-05).
    DeviceStateRequest
    Request body for manually controlling a device's state (FR-06).
    EnergyLogRequest
    Request body for manually recording an energy consumption entry (for testing / FR-14).
    InviteRequest
    Request body for inviting a member by email (FR-20).
    RoomRequest
    Request body for creating or renaming a room (FR-03).
    RuleRequest
    Request body for creating or updating an automation rule (FR-10, FR-11).
    SceneDeviceStateRequest
    The desired state for one device within a scene (FR-17).
    SceneRequest
    Request body for creating or updating a scene (FR-17).
    ScheduleRequest
    Request body for creating or updating a time-based schedule (FR-09).
    UserLoginRequest
    Request body for user login (FR-02).
    UserRegisterRequest
    Request body for registering a new user (FR-01).
    VacationModeRequest
    Request body for activating or updating vacation mode (FR-21).
